title: Topic row component with confidence badges and flag indicators
purpose: Displays a single topic row with name, access count, draft indicator, flag count, and confidence level in a styled UI element.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TopicRow that accepts topic data, click handler, selection state, and optional class name. Includes helper functions for confidence badge styling and formatting.

steps.content: Determine the CSS class names for a badge based on the confidence tier value.
Return green classes for high confidence.
Return yellow classes for medium confidence.
Return red classes for low confidence.
Return gray classes for default or unknown confidence.
Convert the first character of the confidence tier to uppercase.
Return the capitalized confidence tier string.
Accept topic data, click handler, selection state, and optional class name.
Define a click handler that invokes the provided click handler with the topic.
Define a key down handler that triggers the click handler on Enter or space key.
Render a div element with styling for the topic row.
Include topic name and access count in the left side of the row.
Display draft indicator if the topic has a draft.
Display flag count badge if the topic has open flags.
Display confidence badge with appropriate styling based on the topic's confidence.
